measures.name: Cond. Color 2
measures.expression:
VAR _Actual = [OTD % (Value)]
VAR _Target = [OTD % (Value; PY)]
VAR _Performance = DIVIDE ( _Actual - _Target, _Target ) 

-- Sentiment config (percent)
VAR _VeryBad    = -0.075
VAR _Bad        = -0.025
VAR _Good       = 0.025
VAR _VeryGood   = 0.075

-- Color config.
VAR _ActionDotFill = 
    SWITCH (
        TRUE(),
        _Performance < _VeryBad, "#c2255c",       -- Dark red
        -- _Performance < _Bad, "#e6c5da",           -- Light red
        -- _Performance > _Good, "#74B2FF",          -- Light blue
        -- _Performance > _VeryGood, "#2D6390",      -- Dark blue
        "#333333"                               -- Transparent
    )
RETURN
    _ActionDotFill

measures.name: Cond. Color 3
measures.expression:
VAR _Actual = [OTD % (Value)]
VAR _Target = [OTD % (Value; PY)]
VAR _Performance = DIVIDE ( _Actual - _Target, _Target ) 

-- Sentiment config (percent)
VAR _VeryBad    = -0.075
VAR _Bad        = -0.025
VAR _Good       = 0.025
VAR _VeryGood   = 0.075

-- Color config.
VAR _ActionDotFill = 
    SWITCH (
        TRUE(),
        _Performance < _VeryBad, "#c2255c",       -- Dark red
        _Performance < _Bad, "#e6c5da",           -- Light red
        _Performance > _Good, "#74B2FF",          -- Light blue
        _Performance > _VeryGood, "#2D6390",      -- Dark blue
        "#ABABAB"                                 -- Transparent
    )
RETURN
    _ActionDotFill

measures.name: Title - "OTD % (Value) for < Month >"
measures.expression:
VAR _Title  = "OTD % (Value) for "
VAR _Months = 
    SELECTEDVALUE( 
        'Date'[Calendar Month (ie Jan)], 
        CONCATENATEX( 
            VALUES( 'Date'[Calendar Month (ie Jan)] ), 
            'Date'[Calendar Month (ie Jan)], 
            ", " 
        )
    )

RETURN
    _Title & _Months

measures.name: Late Orders
measures.expression: CALCULATE ( [Total Net Order Value], 'Order Status'[Order Status Code] IN { "Late Open Order", "Overdue" } )
